items.name: Ravenveil Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🦇 A mantle of secrets and seduction.
This black and crimson coat features subtle embroidered flourishes and flared sleeves, designed for avatars of charisma and nocturnal grace.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Deep crimson gradient for depth and allure
Flaring cuffs enhance gothic silhouette
Perfect for vampires, nobles, or dark heroes
PBR finish emphasizes fabric realism and shading
🔍 Keywords: coat, red, black, gothic, vampire, elegant, noble, dark, PBR, fantasy
Rule the night — with elegance as your weapon.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

items.description:
A glamorous New Year collection designed to shine through midnight moments and unforgettable celebrations. Featuring elegant silhouettes, soft textures, sparkling details, and dreamy colors, this collection blends femininity, confidence, and festive luxury.

Created for special nights, countdown kisses, and iconic looks this collection celebrates fresh beginnings with style and glow.
Made in partnership with Valmon, bringing together creativity, elegance, and modern fashion for your Roblox avatar.
